rationale: The first-time homebuyer program facilitates mortgage origination and down payment assistance; it does not reference or depend on the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount. No conflict.
quote: The Texas First-Time Homebuyer Program shall facilitate the origination of single-family mortgage loans for eligible first-time homebuyers.
_note: No overlap between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute.
